reasoning: The control SC-16(1) focuses on ensuring the integrity of security and privacy attributes during transmission. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to several areas: ensuring secure transport for network communications, encrypting data at rest and in transit (e.g., etcd encryption), and ensuring integrity of audit logs. NetworkPolicies can enforce secure transport, etcd encryption ensures data integrity at rest, API server TLS ensures secure communication, and audit log integrity verification aligns with ensuring audit logs are not tampered with.
title: Transmission Of Security And Privacy Attributes - Transmission of security and privacy attributes | integrity verification verify
